title: Demi Moore & Margaret Qualley Present Best Television Male Actor – Drama Series

sentences.en: Um, Malcolm, what are you doing here?
What do you mean, what am I doing here, Demi?
sentences.ko: 내가 여기서 뭐하고 있다는 거야, 데미?

sentences.en: Yeah, but it's the Golden Globes, so...
I know, but you have to respect the balance, remember?
sentences.ko: 알아, 하지만 균형을 존중해야 한다고, 기억해?

sentences.en: I know, but I was nominated.
What's the worst that could happen?
Here are the nominees for Best Male Actor in a Drama Series.
